title: DropperAutoCraft
description: A much easier way to auto-craft
body:
# Dropper Auto Craft

Since Mojang introduces the Crafter, the old auto-crafters plugins stop updating...

**But, using Crafter is an absolute pain!**

This plugin brings back the easiest way to auto craft:

Now, place an item frame on a dropper, it will automatically take the materials inside, regardless of shape, trying all possible combinations, then craft the product

- It produces items at hopper speed
- Power it with redstone signals pauses it

Known Issues
---

- **Recipes that left something in the crafting grid won't work**, for example: Honey Bottles → Honey Block, you will **lose the bottles**. I'm still figuring out how to fix this :(
